tasks_completed: Write _ip_geolocation handler in src/services.py using urllib.request
Self-test: handler returns valid JSON (country=United States, city=Ashburn) for 8.8.8.8
Update portfolio.json: ip_geolocation entry with wrapping_cost_credits=3, status=active
learnings: ip-api.com free tier: HTTP only, 45 req/min, no key needed. Returns status field — must check status=='success' before treating as good result.
portfolio.json nesting: service entries go inside the 'services' object, not at top level. Easy to mis-place when editing.
urllib.request.urlopen with timeout=10 is sufficient for simple GET APIs — no new dependencies needed.
